segments.text: Hold a holy meeting on the first day of the seventh month. Don't do any of your normal work. This is the day when you will blow the trumpets.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Present a burnt offering of one young bull, one ram, and seven male lambs a year old, all of them without defects, as a sacrifice acceptable to the Lord,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: along with their grain offerings of the best flour mixed with olive oil: three-tenths of an ephah for the bull, two-tenths of an ephah for the ram,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: and one tenth of an ephah for each of the seven male lambs.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Also present a male goat as a sin offering to make you right.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: These offerings are in addition to the monthly and daily burnt offerings along with their required grain offerings and drink offerings. They are burnt offerings acceptable to the Lord.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Hold a holy meeting on the tenth day of this seventh month, and practice self-denial. Don't do any of your normal work.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Present a burnt offering of one young bull, one ram, and seven male lambs a year old, all of them without defects, acceptable to the Lord.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They are to be accompanied by their grain offerings of the best flour mixed with olive oil: three-tenths of an ephah for the bull, two-tenths of an ephah for the ram,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: and one tenth of an ephah for each of the seven lambs.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Also present a male goat as a sin offering in addition to the sin offering to make you right and the continual burnt offering with its grain offering and drink offering.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Hold a holy meeting on the fifteenth day of the seventh month. Don't do any of your normal work. You are to celebrate a festival dedicated to the Lord for seven days.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Present the following as a burnt offering acceptable to the Lord: thirteen young bulls, two rams, and fourteen male lambs a year old, all of them without defects.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They are to be accompanied by their grain offerings of the best flour mixed with olive oil: three-tenths of an ephah of the best flour mixed with olive oil for each of the thirteen bulls, two-tenths of an ephah for each of the two rams,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: and one tenth of an ephah for each of the fourteen lambs.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Also present a male goat as a sin offering in addition to the continual burnt offering with its grain offering and drink offering.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: On the second day present twelve young bulls, two rams, and fourteen male lambs a year old, all of them without defects.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They are to be accompanied by their grain offerings and drink offerings for the bulls, rams, and lambs, all according to the number required.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Also present a male goat as a sin offering in addition to the continual burnt offering with its grain offering and drink offering.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: On the third day present eleven young bulls, two rams, and fourteen male lambs a year old, all of them without defects.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They are to be accompanied by their grain offerings and drink offerings for the bulls, rams, and lambs, all according to the number required.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Also present a male goat as a sin offering in addition to the continual burnt offering with its grain offering and drink offering.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: On the fourth day present ten young bulls, two rams, and fourteen male lambs a year old, all of them without defects.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They are to be accompanied by their grain offerings and drink offerings for the bulls, rams, and lambs, all according to the number required.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Also present a male goat as a sin offering in addition to the continual burnt offering with its grain offering and drink offering.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: On the fifth day present nine young bulls, two rams, and fourteen male lambs a year old, all of them without defects.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They are to be accompanied by their grain offerings and drink offerings for the bulls, rams, and lambs, all according to the number required.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Also present a male goat as a sin offering in addition to the continual burnt offering with its grain offering and drink offering.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: On the sixth day present eight young bulls, two rams, and fourteen male lambs a year old, all of them without defects.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They are to be accompanied by their grain offerings and drink offerings for the bulls, rams, and lambs, all according to the number required.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Also present a male goat as a sin offering in addition to the continual burnt offering with its grain offering and drink offering.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: On the seventh day present seven young bulls, two rams, and fourteen male lambs a year old, all of them without defects.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They are to be accompanied by their grain offerings and drink offerings for the bulls, rams, and lambs, all according to the number required.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Also present a male goat as a sin offering in addition to the continual burnt offering with its grain offering and drink offering.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: On the eighth day all of you are to meet together. Don't do any of your normal work.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Present the following as a burnt offering acceptable to the Lord: one bull, two rams, and seven male lambs a year old, all of them without defects.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They are to be accompanied by their grain offerings and drink offerings for the bulls, rams, and lambs, all according to the number required.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Also present a male goat as a sin offering in addition to the continual burnt offering with its grain offering and drink offering.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Present these offerings to the Lord at the times you are required to do so, in addition to your offerings to fulfill a promise and freewill offerings, whether they are burnt offerings, grain offerings, drink offerings, or peace offerings.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Moses repeated all this to the Israelites as the Lord ordered him to do.
